issues.summary: [SV][FwVersion880] xx platform black screen after S4
issues.description: Enter S4, resume, then run CrystalDiskMark. Actual result: black screen.

comments.body: Multiple platforms show BSOD. UART log shows admin create queue failed.
Minidump and logs show Max Queue Exceeded. Suspect BIOS compatibility; enlarge MQES and provide debug FW.

issues.root_cause: DFh log total NAND write did not count TLC write
issues.how_to_fix: Fix write count accounting logic in DFh
issues.description: LNDF(224) returns an abnormal NAND write amount.

issues.root_cause: PMC SSP2 abort flow did not handle long PCIe PD to CLKREQ# de-assert timing
issues.description: Reboot case shows boot failure on one platform.

comments.body: GPIO5 is PMIC deep sleep signal; current state is PS4.
Need LP UART and CLKREQ oscilloscope waveform.

issues.summary: [SV][SSD1100][Power][S4 Resume] Device enumerates but first I/O times out
issues.root_cause: Controller ready and I/O queue recreate timing overlap after resume
issues.description: Windows resume sends first I/O before queue context restore completes.

comments.body: Controller ready is set early while queue context restore is still in background.

issues.summary: [DV][SSD1120][Get Log Page] Telemetry host-initiated log length field abnormal
issues.root_cause: Data Area 2 size uses old unit conversion
issues.description: Telemetry Host-Initiated log header reports Data Area 2 size as 2x actual payload.

issues.summary: [RE][SSD1205][SPOR] Power cycle stress enters ROM mode
issues.root_cause: Rebuild consumes block state bitmap before GC metadata restore
issues.description: 2/500 loops fail to enumerate normally and enter ROM mode after power restore.

issues.summary: [SV][SSD1188][Power Consumption] Power Saving Mode higher than Default Mode
issues.root_cause: Performance tuning disabled part of APST entry mask
issues.description: Power Saving Mode average power is 6.4% higher than Default Mode.
